---
title: "Reproducibility Note: Corpus Construction and Bibliometric Analysis"
subtitle: "Companion to 'Inventing Climate Finance' (submitted to *Oeconomia*)"
author: "Minh Ha-Duong"
date: "2026-03-16"
metadata-files: [../_variables.yml]
bibliography: bibliography/main.bib
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
---

This reproducibility note documents the computational pipeline behind the bibliometric analysis in "Inventing Climate Finance: From Incremental Costs to Strategic Ambiguity" (submitted to *Oeconomia*). It is not a standalone paper but a companion to the code repository: the document a reviewer or replicator reads alongside the scripts, data, and configuration files. Part I describes how the corpus of {{< var corpus_total >}} works was assembled from {{< var corpus_sources >}} sources, enriched, and filtered. Part II describes the analyses that transform this corpus into the manuscript's figures and tables, closing with environment setup, execution order, and cross-machine reproducibility.

All scripts are in `scripts/`, generated data in `$CLIMATE_FINANCE_DATA/catalogs/`, and outputs in `content/figures/` and `content/tables/`.

\newpage

# Part I: Corpus Construction

{{< include _includes/corpus-construction.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/corpus-enrichment.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/corpus-refinement.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/core-vs-full.md >}}

\newpage

# Part II: Analysis

{{< include _includes/structural-breaks.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/alluvial-diagram.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/bimodality-analysis.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/pca-scatter.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/citation-genealogy.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/cocitation-communities.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/citation-quality.md >}}

---

{{< include _includes/reproducibility.md >}}
